7.title: In Possession Line Height & Team Length - Away

passing_matrix_partial._note: Player-to-player matrix omitted as cell-level data: the source text export collapses blank/zero cells so individual from->to assignments cannot be reliably reconstructed. Per-'from' row totals are provided instead and reconcile with each player's passes completed (distributions page); sparse rows (e.g. DOUGLAS SANTOS, ROGER IBANEZ) under-count. Top-5 passers captured verbatim.
